title: FNAF: Animatronic Containment
description: A new experience bringing the Five Nights at Freddy's universe into Minecraft. Explore the new structures, decorations and be careful with the new animatronics.
body:
![AC Banner Update 1.4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/86e099e8fb4d0a1674faa709b35bf0b041745362.png)

This mod requires "GeckoLib"

A new horror experience in Minecraft, now bringing a universe from a franchise very familiar to gamers. Prepare your ears and heart and dive into this new mod. Explore new structures and find different animatronics scattered around the world, just be careful, the animatronic characters here do get a bit quirky at night...

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/0aRurtVxo18" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/4VQ3VbYwxKQ" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

We plan to add a new structure and new blocks/items for each FNAF game added in the mod, below we will list the games present in the latest update.

List of included FNAF games:

- Five Nights at Freddy's (1);
- Five Nights at Freddy's 2;
- Five Nights at Freddy's (Family Dinner);
- Five Nights at Freddy's 3.

 (More games in future updates)


This is a project created by the Blocksmith Creations team.
Check out our other projects and check out our YouTube channel:
https://www.youtube.com/@BlocksmithCreations
Also check out our Discord server, where we post updates about all our projects:
